name: Varg Vikernes

acts.description: Convicted of murdering fellow musician Euronymous in 1993
Convicted of burning multiple Norwegian churches in 1992-1993
Prolific white supremacist ideologue; neo-Nazi content creation continuing to present day

behavior_summary: Convicted murderer (killed Euronymous, 1993), convicted arsonist (multiple church burnings), and prolific white supremacist propagandist. Served 15 years. Now lives in France producing neo-Nazi content.

art.summary: Foundational figure in Norwegian black metal. Atmospheric, lo-fi recordings that defined the genre's aesthetic. Made while in prison.

verdict.blurb: Convicted murderer, convicted arsonist, and practicing neo-Nazi who made some genuinely influential records. The ideology is in the music. This is not a close call.
